scripts.verify:packages: pnpm typecheck:packages && pnpm test:web && pnpm test:memories && pnpm test:creador
scripts.build:production: pnpm build:memories && pnpm build:creador && pnpm build:web && pnpm build:copilot
scripts.test:e2e:app:real: E2E_HEADED=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSER=webkit BASE_URL=https://app-test.bodasdehoy.com playwright test --config=playwright.config.ts e2e-app/smoke.spec.ts e2e-app/home.spec.ts e2e-app/login.spec.ts e2e-app/redirect-login.spec.ts --headed
